faq.question: How should I report unrecognised API values or programs found in the logs?
faq.answer: The plugin identifies values from the Home Connect API that it does not currently recognise, such as new wash programs or dryer settings. These are displayed in the logs within a block of TypeScript-style code, with specific lines marked as `// (unrecognised)`. This often happens with newer hardware or after firmware updates. To have these features supported, please open a GitHub issue and provide the entire log block. This information allows the maintainer to add the missing definitions and support the new functionality in a future release.
faq.semantic_abstract: Home Connect appliances occasionally return new program keys or event values that the plugin has not yet mapped to its internal definitions, resulting in `(unrecognised)` markers in log files. These occurrences are typical for new appliance models or firmware updates and require the maintainer to manually update the plugin schema to expose the new functionality.
